name: Saturday Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds Shin Beef, Sliced 3/4 Inch Thick
2 Ounces Flour, Seasoned With Salt And Pepper (Use Garlic Salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat and outer skin from beef. Cut into 1 inch - 1 1/2 inch pieces.
2. Toss the beef in seasoned flour to coat, then brown in hot oil or fat.
3. Add roughly chopped onions. Sprinkle with any remaining seasoned flour.
4. Add hot stock and tomato puree to the pan and bring to a boil.
5. Transfer contents to a large casserole dish. Cover and place in a slow oven (300°F/Gas Mark 2).
6. Peel carrots and potatoes. Leave whole or cut into halves (lengthwise for carrots) if very large.
7. Add vegetables to the casserole and sprinkle with salt.
8. Re-cover and cook until meat is very tender, approximately 3 to 4 hours.
